flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Tennessee College of Applied Technology-Murfreesboro rose 44% between 2021 and 2024 (493 → 709).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Tennessee College of Applied Technology-Murfreesboro rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 (72.5% → 84.8%).
